hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "[CHEGGIE POLICY] Code exploration must use jCodeMunch MCP tools. See CLAUDE.md for the exploration policy." >&2; exit 1'

SessionStart.command: bash -c 'which uvx >/dev/null 2>&1 && uvx jcodemunch-mcp init --repo . --yes 2>/dev/null || echo "[INFO] jcodemunch init skipped (uvx not available)"'
